item.title: （转载）部署React-Vite Application
item.description: Deploying a React Vite Application on Render 前言 原文链接 作者：Tushar Mahajan 发布时间：Apr 10, 2024 When it comes to deployment, Render.com provides a user-friendly platform that integrates seamlessly with your Git workflow. This article will guide you through the process of deploying your React Vite application to Render.com, ensuring a smooth and

item.title: MERN-STACK-CHATAPP-详情说明
item.description: Build and Deploy a Complete Chat App with MERN Stack | JWT, Socket.io, MongoDB | Beginner Friendly 在线试用 Youtube视频链接 原作者GitHub仓库链接 本人Github仓库链接 简介 Build a Realtime Chat App with MERN Stack. Completely beginner friendly.

item.title: 程序员内功心法
item.description: 《程序员修炼之道：从小工到专家》 English name : The Pragmatic Programmer: From Journeyman to Master Authors: Andrew Hunt David Thomas Code Kata的概念是由David Thomas提出的，他是《程序员修炼之道：从小工
